name: signed_vote
description: The validator generated a vote transaction

vote_account.description: The public key of the vote account

vote_authority.description: The public key that authorized the vote

fee_payer.description: The public key that pays for transaction fees

vote_slot.description: Slot being voted on (top of tower)

vote_bank_hash.description: Bank hash of the slot being voted on

vote_block_id.description: Block ID of the slot being voted on

txn_blockhash.description: Recent blockhash parameter of the vote transaction

tower.description: Tower of slots being voted on (oldest to newest)

slot.description: Slot being voted on / locked out for
